OmniDataTransform.expectedInputJson: { "AddressInformation" : { "AddressBlock" : { "Country" : null, "City" : null, "State" : null, "EndDate" : null, "StartDate" : null, "Address" : null, "Zipcode" : null } }, "PersonalInformation" : { "TaxpayerIdentificationType" : null, "Nationality" : null, "TaxpayerIdentificationNumber" : null, "Email" : null, "PhoneType" : null, "PhoneNumber" : null, "DateOfBirth" : null, "Suffix" : null, "Prefix" : null, "MiddleName" : null, "LastName" : null, "FirstName" : null }, "EmploymentInformation" : { "EmploymentBlock" : { "AnnualIncome" : null, "NumHoursAWeek" : null, "HourlyRate" : null, "SalaryType" : null, "JobTitle" : null, "EmploymentEndDate" : null, "EmploymentStartDate" : null, "EmployerName" : null, "EmploymentType" : null } }, "vlcTimeTracking" : { "DataRaptorPostAction1" : null, "CreatePartyProfileAddress" : null, "AddressInformation" : null, "CreateApplicationRecords" : null, "PersonalInformation" : null, "CreatePersonEmployment" : null, "EmploymentInformation" : null, "View Offers" : null, "Application Creation" : null, "CallDigitalLendingApis" : null, "Application Summary" : null, "Automatic Payments" : null, "Income Information" : null }, "vlcPersistentComponent" : { }, "userTimeZone" : null, "userProfile" : null, "userName" : null, "userId" : null, "timeStamp" : null, "ContextId" : null, "View Offers" : { "CustomLWC1" : null }, "Application Creation" : { }, "Application Summary" : { }, "Automatic Payments" : { "AccountType" : null, "AutoPayEnrollment" : null, "SortCodeRoutingNumber" : null, "AccountNumber" : null }, "Income Information" : { "Currency2" : null, "OtherIncomeDescription1" : null, "OtherIncomeDescription2" : null, "Amount1" : null } }
OmniDataTransform.name: DigitalLendingDFUpdateAppFormProductStage
